summary: Gruber addresses a common question from recent Daring Fireball members who signed up before the new Kevin Cornell-designed t-shirts were announced. He offers a simple upgrade path: pay the difference via PayPal and email with size and shipping details. The offer is limited to the membership drive period ending April 16. It's a brief, practical FAQ-style post handling membership logistics.
key_points: Members who signed up before the t-shirt announcement can upgrade by paying the price difference
The upgrade cost is $13 for US/Canada and $18 internationally
The offer expires at the end of the membership drive on April 16
money_quotes: Just to answer what is becoming a very common FAQ.
key_insight: Gruber handles the logistics of his independent membership model with straightforward, reader-friendly customer service.
